title: Welcome to the Web Bootcamp
placeholder: Content Placeholder. This text is in English.
communityCta: Become a member of the community ✦
heroSubtitle: Intensive Web Development bootcamp designed for fast learning and high-impact careers. Go from zero to job-ready in 12 weeks.
featuresSubtitle: Our curriculum is designed by industry professionals, for the professionals of tomorrow.
card1Desc: Master React, Git, Node.js, and modern CSS. Learn the exact toolkit used by top tech companies to build scalable web applications.
card2Desc: Access our premium Coworking Space and startup Incubator. Build your network with dedicated career coaching and interview preparation.
card3Desc: Graduate with officially recognized certifications. Prove your skills with a strong portfolio of real-world projects and assessments.
curriculumSubtitle: 12 intensive weeks taking you from foundations to full-stack, job-ready engineer.
contactSubtitle: Ready to join the next Web Development cohort? Leave us your details and our advisor will reach out within 24h.
footerTagline: Algeria's premier tech bootcamp. We turn beginners into job-ready developers in 12 weeks.
freeAppointmentModalTitle: Free Appointment with our Educational Consultants

curriculumModules.title: Web Foundations & Git
topics: Understanding how the Internet and Web work
Introduction to servers, browsers, and HTTP
HTML page structure and essential tags
Introduction to versioning, Git, and GitHub

curriculumModules.title: Advanced CSS & Animations
topics: The Box Model and CSS Selectors

curriculumModules.title: Algorithms & JavaScript Logic
topics: Variables, loops, and conditions in JavaScript

curriculumModules.title: The DOM & Final Project
topics: Advanced user events and form validation
Building and presenting a functional website

uiuxHeroSubtitle: Go from absolute beginner to a confident UI/UX Designer in 12 weeks. Learn wireframing, prototyping, user research, and Figma mastery.
uiuxFeaturesTitle: Everything You Need to Design Like a Pro
uiuxFeaturesSubtitle: A creative curriculum built purely to construct beautiful, user-centric interfaces.
uiuxCard1Desc: Master auto-layout, components, and variables like a true professional.
uiuxCard2Desc: Understand your users, build personas, and master the art of UX interviews to make data-driven design choices.
uiuxCard3Desc: Breathe life into static screens with advanced micro-interactions.
uiuxCard4Desc: Build scalable, consistent UI kits utilized by top-tier product teams.
uiuxCurriculumSubtitle: An intensive, hands-on syllabus designed to get you hired as a UI/UX Designer.

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: UX Intro, Research & Analysis
topics: User Journey Maps and competitor analysis

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: Ideation, Architecture & Wireframing
topics: Brainstorming, User Flows & defining the MVP

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: UI Design, Systems & High Fidelity
topics: Building UI Kits and reusable components
Organizing a Design System in Figma

uiuxCurriculumModules.title: Prototyping, Testing & Final Project
topics: Comprehensive final project: UX Case Study

uiuxWorkSubtitle: Explore the incredible interfaces built by our recent graduates.
uiuxTestimonial1Quote: The mentorship in this UI/UX bootcamp elevated my design thinking. I landed a role as a Product Designer right after graduation.
uiuxTestimonial2Quote: I finally understand how to build robust Design Systems. Figma went from feeling intimidating to feeling like home.
uiuxTestimonial3Quote: The focus on actual User Research, not just making screens look pretty, was the game changer for my career path.
cyberIntroHeroSubtitle: Go from beginner to confident in 12 weeks. Learn network scanning, vulnerability assessment, and basic cybersecurity concepts in our comprehensive Introduction program.
cyberIntroCertSubtitle: Build a strong foundation in cybersecurity with our rigorous, hands-on 12-week labs.
cyberIntroCard1Desc: Learn practical attacks on networks and hosts, simulating real-world threat actor behaviors.
cyberIntroCard2Desc: Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in modern web applications, mastering essential security concepts.
cyberIntroCard3Desc: Master scanning tools, interpret results, and define actionable remediation strategies.
cyberIntroCard4Desc: Practice with real-world scenarios to guarantee your understanding of core cybersecurity principles.
cyberIntroCurriculumSubtitle: A hands-on curriculum designed to take you from zero to confident in cybersecurity fundamentals.

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Foundations: Cybersecurity & Networks
topics: How the Internet works: IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, OSI
Practical networks: DHCP, ARP, Wi-Fi, NAT
Labs: Wireshark, Nmap, DNS spoofing simulation

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Linux, CLI & Web Security
topics: Bash scripting, grep, awk, sed & log analysis
OWASP Top 10, cookies, sessions & CSRF basics
Labs: Kali intro, command-line challenges, XSS & DVWA

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Red Team & Blue Team Intro
topics: Labs: Wi-Fi scan, hash cracking, log triage & detection rules

cyberIntroCurriculumModules.title: Incident Response & Career Prep
topics: Governance: NIST CSF, ISO 27001, risk management
Cyber team roles: CISO, SOC analyst, pentester
Final CTF: Red Team vs Blue Team + portfolio building

cyberBootcampHeroSubtitle: Go from beginner to confident Junior Penetration Tester. Learn network scanning, vulnerability assessment, and exploit execution in our comprehensive Cybersecurity Bootcamp.
cyberBootcampCertSubtitle: Prepare for the eLearnSecurity Junior Penetration Tester cert with our rigorous, hands-on labs.
cyberBootcampCard1Desc: Learn practical attacks on networks and hosts, simulating real-world threat actor behaviors.
cyberBootcampCard2Desc: Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in modern web applications, mastering essential security concepts.
cyberBootcampCard3Desc: Master scanning tools, interpret results, and define actionable remediation strategies.
cyberBootcampCard4Desc: Practice with exam-like environments to guarantee you pass your eLearnSecurity certification.
cyberBootcampCurriculumSubtitle: An intensive 16-week program at 12h/week — covering everything from networking fundamentals to advanced exploitation and Blue Team defense.

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Network Basics
topics: Understanding how data travels across the Internet

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Linux for Cybersecurity
topics: Using the terminal for security testing

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Introduction to Red Teaming
topics: The different phases of an attack
MITRE ATT&CK and Kill Chain frameworks

cyberBootcampCurriculumModules.title: Advanced Labs & Career Prep
topics: Red Team vs Blue Team scenarios
Intro to Threat Intelligence and forensics
